concerns.text: Task T030 allows implementing 'paired t-test (or Wilcoxon)', but spec FR-005 and SC-003 strictly mandate a 'paired t-test'. The Wilcoxon option is not a valid implementation path for this requirement.

Task T038 specifies '10 bootstrapped samples' which covers FR-008, but fails to cover FR-007 which requires a 'Bootstrap Stability analysis by re-sampling the REAL dataset (n=10 to n=50)'. The sample-size sweep is missing.

Task T032 calculates Pearson correlation (SC-001) but lacks an explicit tag or description linking it to the specific Success Criteria SC-001 or Functional Requirement FR-005 context, creating a traceability gap.

Task T042 mentions updating output.json with 'SC-004, SC-005' but does not explicitly list the calculation of SC-001, SC-002, SC-003, SC-006, SC-007, or SC-008, leaving the coverage of these success criteria ambiguous in the task list.
Task T031 covers FR-009 (power analysis) but does not explicitly mention the condition 'If power is < 0.8, report limitation' which is a mandatory part of FR-009 and SC-008.
